title: x-keeper-live-proof
description: Annotation that every per-family schema document MUST carry as the top-level extension field `x-keeper-live-proof`. Records the live-tenant verification status of the schema's contract surface against a specific Commander pin. Decision basis: docs/V2_DECISIONS.md Q4.

status.description: supported = clean live re-plan exists. preview-gated = offline-green only, requires DSK_PREVIEW=1 to enable. upstream-gap = Commander itself blocks; cite issue. scaffold-only = directory exists, no schema body yet.

evidence.description: Path to live-proof transcript (e.g. docs/proof-transcripts/p9-vault.md) or the literal string 'pending'.

since_pin.description: Commander commit SHA at which this status was last verified.
